title: Set the default Home page when opening monday.com.

posts.author: dmanuele (dmanuele)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

It is very annoying when opening monday to have it open to an arbitrary page set by the administrator. I understand why it might be efficient in some instances, but it would be nice to be able to override it, for instance, to open with my favorites. Or possibly a board that i am concentrating on at the time. Would it be possible to allow users to set their own default opening page?

What are you trying to achieve

Trying to make it more efficient to get to the boards most important without having to stop at the default page determined by the admin.
